TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Himoti ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ku'ang sang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 230 buwan, 635 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 66% kyan ku 421 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 34% kyan ku 214 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 63%, Puyuma 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Himoti hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Himoti hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Himoti hya' ga Kano go. tay mkraya' na Himoti hya' ga Chishang. tay mkraya' na Himoti hya' ga Cipurungan. tay 'zil na Himoti hya' ga Cu ki ngo. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Himoti ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč ńßimoti …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu ku ĒaŇč s~…ēaŇč …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, amis~…ē **%, pujuma *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na ńßimoti ńßja Ē …£a ws~…ēiluŇč krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na ńßimoti ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na ńßimoti ńßja Ē …£a kano …£o. taj mkraja Ē na ńßimoti ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®ńßis~…ēńßaŇč. taj mkraja Ē na ńßimoti ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®ipuruŇčan. taj Ēzil na ńßimoti ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®u ki Ňčo. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj qalaŇč ńßimoti …£a uŇčat kjokaj. ńßas~…ēis~…ējo maki * ńßas~…ēis~…ējo. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Himoti ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ku'ang sang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 230 buwan, 635 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 66% kyan ku 421 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 34% kyan ku 214 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 63%, Puyuma 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Himoti hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Himoti hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Himoti hya' ga Kano go. tay mkraya' na Himoti hya' ga Chishang. tay mkraya' na Himoti hya' ga Cipurungan. tay 'zil na Himoti hya' ga Cu ki ngo. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Himoti ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč ńßimoti …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu ku ĒaŇč s~…ēaŇč …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, amis~…ē **%, pujuma *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na ńßimoti ńßja Ē …£a ws~…ēiluŇč krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na ńßimoti ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na ńßimoti ńßja Ē …£a kano …£o. taj mkraja Ē na ńßimoti ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®ńßis~…ēńßaŇč. taj mkraja Ē na ńßimoti ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®ipuruŇčan. taj Ēzil na ńßimoti ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®u ki Ňčo. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj qalaŇč ńßimoti …£a uŇčat kjokaj. ńßas~…ēis~…ējo maki * ńßas~…ēis~…ējo. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
